title: Sanvitaliopsis nelsonii

taxonomy: Sanvitaliopsis nelsonii is classified as a flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification makes it a type of orchid. The plant is native to the Andes mountains in South America, where it grows in mountainous regions. As an orchid, Sanvitaliopsis nelsonii is further categorized as a member of the subfamily Epidendroideae. Its classification within the orchid family allows for the study of its unique characteristics and evolution.
